results.validation_notes: The original classification included Microservices and Domain-Driven Design, but deep context analysis reveals these are incorrect. This repository is the implementation of an event-driven platform (Pulsar), not an application using microservices architecture. The components (broker, proxy, websocket) are parts of a distributed platform with coordinated deployment via shared configuration and build system (Maven parent POM), not independently deployable microservices. DDD is not evident - the module structure follows technical decomposition (client/, broker/, common/, metadata/) rather than domain-driven bounded contexts with aggregates, entities, and value objects. The Event-Driven classification is accurate and strongly supported by the core pub-sub messaging semantics.
